reviews.comment:
No nos permitieron tomar mate aun comprando comida. Dale!! Llovía hacia frío llegamos de Bariloche y no podíamos visitar nada a causa de la lluvia. Nos volvimos a Bariloche, una pena.

(Translated by Google)
They wouldn't let us drink mate even though we'd bought food. Come on! It was raining and cold; we arrived from Bariloche and couldn't visit anything because of the rain. We went back to Bariloche, what a shame.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURSNzlYQ2l3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio... Cuál sería el significado de servicio? A las 7 de la tarde cierra el shop... A la mañana, querés emprender viaje temprano con un café o algo y también cerrado!!! La verdad, un no servicio...

(Translated by Google)
Gas station... What does "service" even mean? The shop closes at 7 pm... In the morning, you want to start your trip early with a coffee or something, and it's closed too! Honestly, it's not a service at all...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURSaWVIeUp3EAE
